WITH cohort AS (
  SELECT 
    l.id_bioguide,
    MIN(t.term_start) AS first_term_start
  FROM legislators l
  JOIN legislators_terms t ON l.id_bioguide = t.id_bioguide
  WHERE t.term_start >= '1917-01-01' AND t.term_start <= '1999-12-31'
  GROUP BY l.id_bioguide
),
retention AS (
  SELECT 
    c.id_bioguide,
    c.first_term_start,
    strftime('%Y', '1999-12-31') AS year_end,
    CASE 
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM legislators_terms t2 
        WHERE t2.id_bioguide = c.id_...
